ABOUT NOVA LAWN CARE

Nova Lawn Care is a lawn care company based in Orleans that’s been setting the standard in lawn care and maintenance. Our team, equipped with extensive experience and the best tools of the trade, is dedicated to providing an all-encompassing lawn care service. We’re more than just a lawn care company; we’re a team that values quality, customer satisfaction, and professional growth. At Nova Lawn Care, we believe in nurturing long-term relationships with our clients and our employees. Our work environment is professional yet laid-back, offering opportunities for personal and professional development. Joining us means being part of a family that takes pride in transforming lawns and lives.

Lawn Care Jobs in Gloucester
WORK, GROW, AND THRIVE
Competitive Wages
We offer competitive wages in the lawn care industry, ensuring our team members are rewarded for their hard work and dedication. You’ll find that your efforts are valued and fairly compensated at Nova Lawn Care.
Professional Training
At Nova Lawn Care, we invest in your growth. Our comprehensive paid training programs are designed to enhance your skills and knowledge, setting you up for success in the lawn care field.
